subcodes.first_line: O exalted branch of the divine Lote-Tree! In the night and the day, at morn and eventide, yea, even in darkness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره الربانیه در شب و روز و صباح و مساء بلکه در ظلمات
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
